overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Watch Dogs: Legion showing a character in a leather jacket walking through rainy London streets at night. The character navigates past historic brick buildings with orange neon accents, crosses intersections with emergency vehicles and a red double-decker bus, and walks along wet sidewalks reflecting street lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic street with neon-lit building facade

events.description: character turns right from narrow sidewalk onto wider street
moving from building corridor to open intersection with view of distant modern tower

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to an orange-lit historic building, then turning onto the cobblestone street

entered.detail: historic brick building with distinctive horizontal orange neon lighting along the roofline
traditional red brick building with white window frames and cornice details
rain-slicked cobblestone pavement reflecting street lights
red and white striped plastic construction fencing

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk beside a historic building illuminated by warm orange neon lights. The wet cobblestones reflect the ambient light as the character turns onto a wider street, revealing a mix of historic architecture and a distant modern glass tower under a dark stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with bus stop and vehicle traffic

events.description: large white delivery truck passes by on the right side of the street
approaching bus shelter with illuminated digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking along the road passing a white truck and approaching a bus stop with digital ads

notable_agents.action: white delivery truck driving past the character on the wet street

entered.detail: large white box truck with dark cab driving along the street
glass and metal bus stop shelter with bench seating
illuminated advertisement display showing technician certification promotion with ctOS branding
classic red London double-decker bus with illuminated interior

segments.scene_description: The character crosses onto the asphalt street as a white delivery truck passes by. The scene opens up to reveal a bus stop shelter with a glowing ctOS digital billboard. A red double-decker bus becomes visible in the distance as the character approaches the transit area.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with emergency vehicles and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: crossing the street near a stationary emergency ambulance with flashing lights
passing large digital billboard and graffiti wall with TOAST tagging

agents.ego_description: crossing the street near emergency vehicles and walking past a bus stop with advertisements

notable_agents.action: emergency ambulance with green and yellow checkered markings parked at the intersection

entered.detail: white emergency vehicle with green and yellow Battenburg markings and flashing lights
concrete wall covered in large white graffiti reading TOAST with additional tags
large illuminated advertisement showing a male face with text THEY LOOK LIKE YOU
dark colored compact car parked at the curb
dark glass shop windows with posters and reflections

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the red double-decker bus and crosses near a stationary emergency ambulance with flashing lights. The environment features urban decay elements including a graffiti-covered wall with large TOAST lettering and a prominent digital billboard displaying a surveillance-themed advertisement. The wet pavement creates strong reflections of the emergency vehicle lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk leading to grand historic stone building

events.description: approaching large historic stone building with classical columns and stairs
character slows pace while passing the illuminated stone facade of the building

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past storefronts and approaching a grand historic building with stone columns, observing the architecture

entered.detail: large classical stone building with columns, pediment, and warm uplighting on the facade
wide stone staircase leading up to the building entrance
tall arched windows with multiple panes on the stone building
mature trees with autumn foliage lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial sidewalk lined with mature trees and dark storefronts, approaching an impressive historic stone building with classical architecture. The building features grand columns, arched windows, and warm uplighting that highlights the stone texture against the night sky. The character slows to observe the architecture while walking past the wide stone staircase entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy London night, transitioning from narrow neon-lit alleys to a grand architectural plaza. It begins beside a historic building with warm orange neon lights reflecting off wet cobblestones, moving forward as the view expands to reveal a distant modern glass tower under a stormy sky. As the character steps onto the asphalt, the scene opens up to include a glowing ctOS digital billboard and a red double-decker bus approaching through the rain. The camera then glides past a stationary ambulance with flashing lights and a graffiti-covered wall, where the wet pavement mirrors the emergency strobes before shifting toward a commercial sidewalk lined with mature trees. Finally, the movement slows as it approaches an impressive historic stone building, with the lighting shifting to warm uplighting that accentuates grand columns and arched windows.
